title: Relaxation of additional fees and extension of time and filing of e-Forms by the Companies under Companies Act, 2013 and for filing of Annual Return (Form 11) by the LLPs under the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008
description: Relaxation of additional fees and extension of time and filing of e-Forms by the Companies under Companies Act, 2013 and for filing of Annual Return (Form 11) by the LLPs under the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008
text: Circular No. 0712016 F.No. MCA/21l33/2016-e-Gov cell Government of India Ministry of Corporate Affairs sth Flool, A Win& Shastri Bhavan Dr. R.P. Road, New Delhi-l10001 '-d the Regional Directors, All the Registrar of Companies / Official Liquidators Dated 30.05.2016 '{ All Stakeholders Sub: Relaxation of additional fees and extension of time for filing of e- Forms by the Companies under Companies Act,2013 and for filing of Annual Return (Form 11 ) by the LLP8 under the Limited Liability Partnership Act,2008. Sir, In continuation of this Ministry's General Circular No.03/2016 dated I2.04.2016 and General Circular No.06 /2016 dated 16.05.2016, keeping in view requests received from vadous stakeholders, it has been decided to extend the period for which the one time waiver of additional fees is applicable to all eforms which are due for filing by companies between 25.O3.2O16 to 30.06.2016 as well as extend the last date for filing such documents and availing the benefit of waiver to 10.07.2016 2. Further, in view of the requests received from stakeholders, it has been decided to extend the time limit prescdbed under the provisions of section 35 of LLP Act, for filing of Form 11 of LLIJ in respect oI Financial Year ending on 31.3.2016 upto 30.06.2016, without additional fees. 3. This issues with the approval of competent authority. Yourc faithfully, \-tS,+*^-"+ Alok Samantarar Director (lnspection & Investigation) Copy to : 1. All Conccrncd 2. PS to CAM 3.
